isolation.surface: interactive CLI with true PTY/TTY only

assertions.title: spikes init --json in a TTY writes hosted config and does not hang

steps.command: ( /Users/moritzbierling/werk/repos/spikes/cli/target/debug/spikes init --json > out.json 2> err.txt ) & pid=$!; ( sleep 2; if kill -0 $pid 2>/dev/null; then echo __GUARD_KILLED__; kill $pid; fi ) & guard=$!; wait $pid; ec=$?; kill $guard 2>/dev/null; wait $guard 2>/dev/null; echo __INIT_EXIT__:$ec
steps.expected: Process completes under guard, not killed, exits 0

steps.action: Inspect JSON output and generated config
steps.expected: JSON reports hosted decision and config contains hosted=true + endpoint=https://spikes.sh
steps.observed: out.json: success=true, hosted=true, remote.endpoint=https://spikes.sh; err.txt empty; config contains hosted = true and endpoint = "https://spikes.sh"

steps.action: Start interactive init and capture pre-input prompt
steps.expected: Prompt mentions hosted/spikes.sh, self-host, and hosted-default indicator
steps.observed: Prompt captured exactly as: 'Use hosted spikes.sh (default) or self-host? [H/s]'

steps.action: Accept default and verify resulting config
steps.observed: __INIT_EXIT__: 0; config includes hosted = true and endpoint = "https://spikes.sh"

assertions.title: Interactive H, empty Enter, and h all select hosted

steps.action: Run interactive init, send uppercase H, inspect config
steps.observed: __INIT_EXIT__: 0; config contains hosted = true and endpoint = "https://spikes.sh"

steps.action: Run interactive init, send empty Enter, inspect config
steps.observed: __INIT_EXIT__: 0; config contains hosted = true and endpoint = "https://spikes.sh"

steps.action: Run interactive init, send lowercase h, inspect config
steps.observed: __INIT_EXIT__: 0; config contains hosted = true and endpoint = "https://spikes.sh"

steps.action: Run interactive init and select self-host
steps.observed: Init output shows 'Initialized .spikes/ directory (self-host mode)' and __INIT_EXIT__: 0

steps.action: Validate config parses via spikes config

frictions.description: tuistory sessions prepend a macOS shell notice ('default interactive shell is now zsh') to each transcript, so assertion matching required focusing on the command/prompt region.
frictions.resolution: Used dedicated prompt/outcome transcript files per assertion and matched exact assertion strings within those files.

frictions.description: When driving the [H/s] prompt via tuistory, uppercase H is echoed as lowercase h in terminal output.
frictions.resolution: Validated behavior by command input path and resulting config outcome (hosted=true, endpoint=https://spikes.sh), which satisfied the assertion contract.

summary: Tested 4 assertions (VAL-CONFIG-006b, VAL-CONFIG-009, VAL-CONFIG-010, VAL-CONFIG-011) on true TTY via tuistory in isolated temp dirs; all 4 passed.
